div.head: Mr. Mizner to Mr. Blaine.

opener.dateline:
Legation of the United States, Central America,
El Paso, Tex., August 5, 1890.

div.p: Mr. Mizner informs Mr. Blaine that General Ezeta declines the good offices of the United States, and declares his intention of hoisting his flag in Guatemala City. He adds that Guatemala had the advantage in the last [yesterday’s] battles; gives advice of his own movements, and reports the neglect of Guatemala to return the arms seized on the Pacific Mail steamship Colima.
